name: Upgrade Bitcoin Rewards Visa

welcome_offer.description: No welcome bonus. This card has been discontinued and is no longer available to new applicants.

earning_rates.notes: Earn 1.5% cash back in bitcoin when you make payments. Rewards earned as you pay down your balance — not on spending alone.

other_benefits.name: Credit/loan hybrid
other_benefits.description: Card functions as both credit card and installment loan — remaining balance converts to fixed-rate loan with equal monthly payments

other_benefits.name: Bitcoin rewards
other_benefits.description: Earn rewards in bitcoin (held in NYDIG wallet) as you make payments, not as spending rewards

sources.notes: Upgrade official page — current card lineup

notes: The Upgrade Bitcoin Rewards Visa is discontinued and no longer accepting new applications. It was discontinued around 2023 during the crypto market downturn. The card earned 1.5% back in bitcoin, but only as users paid down their balance — it was not a traditional spending rewards card. It was a credit/installment loan hybrid. Current Upgrade products include the Upgrade Cash Rewards Visa (1.5% cash back) and Upgrade Triple Cash Rewards Visa (3% on home/auto/health, 1% elsewhere). Annual fee was $0.
